nasb.text: Say to God, “How awesome are Your works! Because of the greatness of Your power Your enemies will give feigned obedience to You.

esv.text: Say to God, “How awesome are your deeds! So great is your power that your enemies come cringing to you.

cnv.text: 要對　神說：“你的作為多麼可畏！ 因你偉大的能力，你的仇敵必向你假意歸順。

ccb.text: 要对上帝说：“你的作为令人敬畏！ 你的大能使敌人屈膝投降。

csbs.text: 当对神说：“你的作为多么可畏！ 因你强大的能力，你的仇敌向你卑躬屈膝。
